name: vscode-unify-chat-provider
desc: Integrate multiple LLM API providers into VS Code's GitHub Copilot Chat using the Language Model API. One-click use of your Claude Code, Gemini CLI, Antigravit…
descFull: Integrate multiple LLM API providers into VS Code's GitHub Copilot Chat using the Language Model API. One-click use of your Claude Code, Gemini CLI, Antigravity, Github Copilot, OpenAI Codex (ChatGPT Plus/Pro), xAI Grok (SuperGrok / X Premium+) account quotas.
